claim.label: Gross logo churn
claim.raw_text: Gross logo churn was 3.1% for Q4.

evidence.span_text: No quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for this review cycle.

verdict.rationale: The ops review explicitly states no gross logo churn metric was approved for this cycle, and no other vault document (finance pack or customer appendix) reports a churn figure of any kind.
verdict.suggested_action: Request the underlying customer cohort data needed to compute gross logo churn, or ask the report author to source the 3.1% figure.
